topic.title: 세금 준비 및 신고
topic.description: 세금 신고 시즌을 맞아 필요한 서류 준비부터 신고 마감일 관리까지, 초급 학습자를 위한 핵심 내용을 다룹니다.

korean_scripts.korean_text: A: "세금 신고 시즌이 다가오는데, 뭘 준비해야 할지 모르겠어요."
B: "걱정 마세요. 모든 소득 증명서와 영수증을 미리 챙기는 것이 첫 단계예요."
B: "예를 들어, 급여 명세서나 이자 보고서 같은 것들이죠."
B: "보통 4월 15일이에요. 신고 기한을 놓치지 않도록 주의해야 해요."
A: "정보 정말 감사합니다. 덕분에 시작할 용기가 생겼어요."

foreign_scripts.foreign_text: A: "The tax filing season is approaching, and I don't know what to prepare."
foreign_scripts.chunked_text: A: "The tax filing season is approaching, | and I don't know | what to prepare."

foreign_scripts.foreign_text: B: "Don't worry. Gathering all income statements and receipts beforehand is the first step."
foreign_scripts.chunked_text: B: "Don't worry. | Gathering all income statements and receipts beforehand | is the first step."

foreign_scripts.foreign_text: A: "I see. What income statements do I need?"
foreign_scripts.chunked_text: A: "I see. | What income statements | do I need?"

foreign_scripts.foreign_text: B: "For example, things like pay stubs or interest statements."
foreign_scripts.chunked_text: B: "For example, | things like pay stubs | or interest statements."

foreign_scripts.foreign_text: A: "Okay. When is the set filing deadline?"
foreign_scripts.chunked_text: A: "Okay. | When is the set filing deadline?"

foreign_scripts.foreign_text: B: "It's usually April 15th. You need to be careful not to miss the filing deadline."
foreign_scripts.chunked_text: B: "It's usually April 15th. | You need to be careful | not to miss the filing deadline."

foreign_scripts.foreign_text: A: "Thank you so much for the information. It gives me the courage to start."
foreign_scripts.chunked_text: A: "Thank you so much for the information. | It gives me the courage to start."

highlight_sentences.reason: 세금 신고 준비의 가장 근본적인 시작점을 제시하며, 구체적인 항목을 명시하여 실질적인 도움을 줍니다.
